pages.title: Work Bench
pages.text: Metal Plates are fundamental materials in Neko Technology. You'll need them to craft machines and tools. To get started, craft a Work Bench and a Hammer.

pages.title: Crafting at the Work Bench
pages.text: Right-click to place an item on the Work Bench, then use your Hammer to work it.
Sneak and right-click while empty-handed to retrieve the finished product.

pages.title: Display Case
pages.text: Sneak and right-click with a Glass Cover to turn your Work Bench into a display case.
